title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 examines why AI still struggles reliably with document editing despite being deployed at scale. The core challenge is that AI treats documents as simple text files rather than as structured programs with internal logic, preventing it from safely making edits without breaking document integrity.
